mechanism: Equities price the full fiscal-sustained economy (5-6% NGDP) while rates price only the private-sector economy (3-4% NGDP). The divergence is a direct manifestation of fiscal dominance creating two legitimate but incompatible growth readings depending on whether fiscal is permanent or transient.
regime_dependence: Holds as long as the fiscal deficit maintains the wedge between private and aggregate growth. Resolves when either equities de-rate or rates reprice fiscal permanence.
